specs.title: TC-SSO-RBA-002 — claims:read (non-admin) → GET /v1/audit-events 403
TC-SSO-RBA-003 — claims:read scope → GET /v1/claim-cases 200
TC-SSO-RBA-004 — claims:read scope → POST /v1/claim-cases 403 [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-005 — claims:write scope → POST /v1/claim-cases 201 (or 400 on validation)
TC-SSO-RBA-006 — claims:write scope → DELETE /v1/claim-cases/{id} 200/404 [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-007 — calls:read scope → POST /v1/claim-cases 403 [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-008 — no scope (empty array) → GET /v1/claim-cases 200 (auth-only check today)
TC-SSO-RBA-009 — cases:read scope → GET /v1/eligibility-cases 200
TC-SSO-RBA-010 — cases:read scope → POST /v1/eligibility-cases 403 [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]

TC-SSO-RBA-012 — cases:write scope → DELETE /v1/eligibility-cases/{id} [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-013 — claims:read → GET /v1/eligibility-cases 403 (cross-resource) [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-014 — calls:read scope → GET /v1/calls/{id} returns 200/404 (auth ok)
TC-SSO-RBA-015 — claims:read → GET /v1/calls/{id}/transcript 403 (cross-resource) [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-016 — calls:read scope → GET /v1/calls/{id}/result 200/404
TC-SSO-RBA-017 — calls:read scope → POST /v1/calls/{id}/end 403 [scope enforcement deferred to Phase 3 hardening (http.ts only checks auth.valid for non-admin endpoints)]
TC-SSO-RBA-018 — calls:write scope → POST /v1/calls/{id}/end 200/400/404 (auth ok)
TC-SSO-RBA-019 — admin scope → GET /v1/claim-cases 200 (admin == superset)
TC-SSO-RBA-020 — admin scope → POST /v1/eligibility-cases (or 400)
TC-SSO-RBA-021 — multi-scope key (claims:read + cases:read) → both endpoints 200
TC-SSO-RBA-022 — invalid scope name rejected at issue time
TC-SSO-RBA-023 — revoked key returns 401 regardless of original scope
TC-SSO-RBA-024 — no Authorization header → 401 on every protected endpoint
